name: Cloudgate LMS
description: A complete Learning Management System built on Cloudgate (React + Vite + Tailwind). Browse a course catalog, author lessons and quizzes, enroll and track progress with a lesson player, take auto-graded quizzes, and earn completion certificates. Fully behind Cloudgate IdP auth, with all data served by Cloudgate workflow APIs.

workflowImport.description: Creates the LMS controller (project path 'lms') with its SQLite database and all workflow endpoints the app calls at runtime.
workflowImport.publishHint: Import the bundle (creates lms_db and runs .template/schema.sql), then publish all LMS endpoints to sandbox. Verify POST /sbx/lms/dashboard {"op":"stats"} returns course/enrolment counts.
